top_sources.top_context: ovo lipogenesis - Restores mitochondrial function - These effects GLP-1 alone CANNOT replicate ### Why it doesn't raise blood sugar - GLP-1 component **counterbalances** glucagon's glucose-raising effect - No increased risk of hyperglycemia in trials of either compound ## ⭐ Clinical Benefits ### Mazdutide (6 mg/wk) - **80% reduction in liver fat** in baseline hepatic steatosis - A1C reductions of **1.5-2.15%** - Heart rate increase only **~2.6 bpm at 48 weeks** ### Survodutide - **62% MASH resolution** vs 14% placebo - 67% achieved >30% liver fat reduction - Dramatic ALT/AST reductions ### Both pe
